trendThresholds.improving: Recent 3-run average exceeds overall average by >0.5
trendThresholds.declining: Recent 3-run average falls >0.5 below overall average

Al Jazeera.notes: Two appearances; AI governance and regulation coverage; scores 8.8, 8.7

Bloomberg.notes: Strong sourcing; third, fourth, and fifth appearances paywalled (unscored). In Tier C evaluation.

Breaking Defense.notes: Single appearance; defense technology reporting on Anthropic Pentagon injunction.

CNBC.notes: Consistent performance; sixth appearance paywalled (unscored). In Tier C evaluation.

European Parliament.notes: Vendor primary source; official EU institutional source

Figma Blog.notes: Single appearance; vendor blog MCP integration announcement

Financial Times.notes: In Tier C evaluation. First appearance; paywalled (unscored).

Fortune.notes: Five appearances; overallAvg 7.92; score of 5.0 (AI-20260326) prevents Tier D auto-promotion. Recent 3-run avg (5.0, 9.45, 8.65) = 7.70 vs overall 7.92 (delta -0.22, within stable threshold).

Futurism.notes: Single appearance; Anthropic Mythos model leak coverage.

GitHub.notes: In Tier C evaluation. 0 appearances to date.

GitHub Blog.notes: First appearance; vendor blog direct policy announcement; strong primary sourcing

The Guardian.notes: First appearance; credible UK outlet, primary sourcing on FCA contract story solid

The Hill.notes: Single appearance; skipped as duplicate Anthropic Pentagon ruling coverage.

Import AI.notes: Preferred source. Two appearances; consistent quality across research summaries.

Mistral AI.notes: Vendor primary source; first appearance — Voxtral open-weight TTS model release

MIT Technology Review.notes: Preferred source; stable; 6 appearances; overallAvg 7.63; most recent score 7.1

The Neuron.notes: Two appearances; digest-format aggregator; low scores (5.0, 4.75)

NPR.notes: Single appearance; Anthropic Pentagon ban preliminary injunction coverage.

Reuters.notes: Four appearances; named journalists, clean source chains. Scores: 8.5 (Tencent/WeChat, AI-20260323-test), 9.5 (Shield AI, AI-20260326), 9.2 (Shield AI, AI-20260327), 9.2 (SoftBank $40B, AI-20260327). Recent 3-run avg 9.30 vs overall 9.10 (delta 0.20, within stable threshold). In Tier C evaluation.

Simon Willison's Blog.notes: In Tier C evaluation. 0 appearances to date.

TechCrunch.notes: Stable overall; 17 appearances; overallAvg 7.86; scores of 6.5 (AI-20260323) prevent Tier D auto-promotion.

The Batch.notes: Preferred source. Andrew Ng / DeepLearning.AI. 0 appearances to date.

The Decoder.notes: Four appearances; auto-promoted from Tier D to Tier C at run AI-20260327 (appearances > 3, all individual scores > 7.0). Scores: ~7.51 (prior), 7.5 (Karpathy, AI-20260322-test), 8.0 (Xiaomi MiMo, AI-20260322-test), 8.65 (Mythos, AI-20260327). In Tier C evaluation.

The New Stack.notes: Preferred source; strong security audit coverage

Techzine.notes: Single appearance; skipped as duplicate Anthropic Mythos model leak coverage.

Transparency Coalition.notes: Three appearances; overallAvg 7.95. Recent 3-run avg equals overall (stable).

VentureBeat.notes: Preferred source; improving; 14 appearances; overallAvg 8.58; recent 3-score avg 9.53 vs overall 8.58 (delta 0.95, exceeds improving threshold 0.5)

Wall Street Journal.notes: First appearance; strong outlet, anonymous sourcing standard for internal corporate tools reporting; credible. In Tier C evaluation.

arXiv.notes: In Tier C evaluation. 0 appearances to date.

runLog.notes: Test run. Cursor/Kimi (TechCrunch, 8.98), Xiaomi MiMo (The Decoder, 8.4), Karpathy bottleneck (The Decoder, 7.65).
Test run. Meta CEO Agent/WSJ (8.15 Featured), Tencent ClawBot/Reuters (7.88 HM), Palantir FCA/Guardian (7.78 HM). New sources: WSJ, Reuters, The Guardian.

Full run. Featured: UK Cyber Scaling Law/Import AI (9.20), China MERLIN/Import AI (9.00), DeepMind Cognitive Taxonomy/Import AI (8.85), Warren-Anthropic-Pentagon/TechCrunch (8.55), Bay Area Animal+AI Welfare/MIT Tech Review (8.45). Import AI dominated.
Full run. No articles evaluated; no subscribers received this run.

Full run (Pass 3 updated). Featured: Mistral TTS/VentureBeat (10.0), TurboQuant/VentureBeat (9.5), Shield AI/Reuters (9.5), Data center pause/Al Jazeera (8.7). HMs: OpenAI adult chatbot/Engadget (7.1), Download/MIT Tech Review (7.1). Paywalled: Wired/AI safety bill, FT/OpenAI chatbot. Skipped: TechCrunch/Mistral (10, duplicate), TechCrunch/Shield AI (9.5, duplicate). New sources: Financial Times.

Full run (two-batch Pass 3 update). Featured (7): Anthropic Mythos leak/Fortune (9.45), Anthropic ban ruling/NPR (9.45), SoftBank $40B/Reuters (9.2), Voxtral TTS/Mistral AI (9.8, Tier A), Shield AI funding/Reuters (9.2, Tier C), Mistral Voxtral/VentureBeat (9.1, Tier B), AI Legislative Update/Transparency Coalition (8.65). HM (4): Anthropic injunction/Breaking Defense (8.9), Mythos/The Decoder (8.65), SoftBank IPO thesis/TechCrunch (8.4), Anthropic leak/Futurism (8.4). Paywalled (3): Wired/Anduril safety, Bloomberg/Shield AI acquisition, Bloomberg/SoftBank loan. Skipped (3): duplicate Fortune/Anthropic, The Hill/Anthropic injunction, Techzine/Mythos. Anthropic (Pentagon ban, Mythos leak) and defense AI dominated. New sources: Mistral AI, NPR, Breaking Defense, Futurism, The Hill, Techzine. The Decoder auto-promoted to Tier C.
